title: Berrybush Magic
description: A simple magic mod about magic, wands and more magic. With the mentioned wands being heavily customizable.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/NlEx0rr.png](https://i.imgur.com/NlEx0rr.png)


This is **Berrybush Magic**, A minecraft mod that is meant to be my own take on a vanilla plus style of magic.

The way the magic works is by creating a **Wand**, wands can be crafted with an **Amethyst Shard**, **Stick**, **Gold Ingot** and two **Diamonds**. From there, wands have different attributes based on the materials used in the new **Imbument Table**, as you can add special effcts to wands like  extra spell power or increased spell range by using base game materials. Changing the item in the central slot of the wand changes it's spell as well.

![https://i.imgur.com/QvoLzI5.png](https://i.imgur.com/QvoLzI5.png)
